scenes.description: Song performance: Vestia Zeta, Kaela Kovalskia, and Kobo Kanaeru perform 'Dah Lah Saja'.
MC section: Gen 3 members greet the audience and introduce themselves as holoh3ro.

subtitles.original: Saat dunia tak berjalan semestinya
subtitles.english: When the world doesn't go the way it should

subtitles.original: Mungkin sudahlah saatnya kau coba lepaskan saja
subtitles.english: Maybe it's time you tried to let it go

subtitles.original: Tak perlu tanya mengapa lagi
subtitles.english: No need to ask why anymore

subtitles.original: Jika memang jawaban tak kau dapatkan
subtitles.english: If you can't find the answer

subtitles.original: Jangan tangisi coba lalui teka-tekinya
subtitles.english: Don't cry, try to go through the puzzles

subtitles.original: Relakanlah karena pada akhirnya
subtitles.english: Let it go, because in the end

subtitles.original: Kau lebih kuat daripada yang kau kira
subtitles.english: You're stronger than you think

subtitles.original: Dah lah saja oh dah lah saja, jalani saja
subtitles.english: Just let it be, oh just let it be, just live it

subtitles.original: Dah lah saja oh dah lah saja, jalani saja
subtitles.english: Just let it be, oh just let it be, just live it

subtitles.original: Mau di mana lagi
subtitles.english: Where else could it be?

subtitles.original: Walau kadang mati rasa
subtitles.english: Even if it's sometimes numb

subtitles.original: Bahkan hingga tak berdaya
subtitles.english: Even to the point of helplessness

subtitles.original: Dan usahamu terasa sia-sia
subtitles.english: And your efforts feel in vain

subtitles.english: If you can't find the answer

subtitles.english: Don't cry, try to go through the puzzles

subtitles.english: You're stronger than you think

subtitles.english: Just let it be, oh just let it be, just live it

subtitles.original: Lepas semua kendali
subtitles.english: Let go of all control

subtitles.original: Tancap gas dan berlari
subtitles.english: Hit the gas and run

subtitles.original: Terima dan sudahi

subtitles.original: Comic Frontier! Konbanwa!
subtitles.english: Comic Frontier! Good evening!

subtitles.original: Konbanwa! Comic Frontier! Konbanwa!
subtitles.english: Good evening! Comic Frontier! Good evening!

subtitles.original: Welcome to Hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future!
subtitles.english: Welcome to Hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future!

subtitles.original: Wah, gila gila gila. Makasih banyak semuanya udah pada datang ke konser 5 tahun kita ya!
subtitles.english: Wow, this is crazy. Thank you so much for coming to our 5th anniversary concert!

subtitles.original: Wah, nggak berasa nggak sih udah 5 tahun aja?
subtitles.english: Wow, doesn't it feel like it's been 5 years already?

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu, kita mulai dari perkenalan diri dulu nggak sih? Mulai dari aku-aku!
subtitles.english: So, shall we start with introductions? Starting with me!

subtitles.original: Aaa, mission start!
subtitles.english: Aaa, mission start!

subtitles.original: Aku Vestia Zeta dari Hololive Indonesia Gen 3. Nice to meet you!
subtitles.english: I'm Vestia Zeta from Hololive Indonesia Gen 3. Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: Nice to meet you, Zeta!
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you, Zeta!

subtitles.original: Kaelo, grinding every time, the blacksmith from Hololive ID Gen 3!
subtitles.english: Kaelo, grinding every time, the blacksmith from Hololive ID Gen 3!

subtitles.original: I'm Kaela Kovalskia. Nice to meet you all!
subtitles.english: I'm Kaela Kovalskia. Nice to meet you all!

subtitles.original: Nice to meet you, Kaelo!
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you, Kaelo!

subtitles.original: Hoi, Boke-boke-boke! Kobo Kanaeru at your service!
subtitles.english: Hoi, Boke-boke-boke! Kobo Kanaeru at your service!

subtitles.original: Let me be your sun to shine your day! Ehe!
subtitles.english: Let me be your sun to shine your day! Ehe!

subtitles.original: Kobokers, mana suaranya?!
subtitles.english: Kobokers, let me hear you!

subtitles.original: Nah bertiga, kami dari Hololive Indonesia Gen 3, holoh3ro!
subtitles.english: The three of us, we are Hololive Indonesia Gen 3, holoh3ro!

subtitles.original: Wah, nggak nyangka juga deh konser 5th anniversary Hololive ID ini akhirnya ada juga.
subtitles.english: Wow, I didn't expect the Hololive ID 5th anniversary concert would finally happen.

subtitles.original: Dari lagu pertama aja udah keren banget, guys. Kerasa nggak sih semangatnya?
subtitles.english: Even from the first song it's been so cool, guys. Can you feel the passion?
